title: schefflera polita
intro: Schefflera polita, also known as the Umbrella Plant or Parasol Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schefflera polita include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
